title: Asynchronous reset generated using FPGA logic reset trick...

features.name: register initialization with concatenation using 1'b0
features.description: Code should include a register initialization with a concatenation expression that includes 1'b0 as the first element

features.name: async reset in always block sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with asynchronous reset using negedge trigger in sensitivity list

features.name: gated clock at zero value during reset
features.description: Code should include a gated clock scenario where clock is held at zero during reset time

features.name: non-blocking assignment shift register
features.description: Code should include non-blocking assignments in a shift register pattern where higher bits receive lower bit values
